title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why are you making that expression?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: gyaaa a!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Straw hat Luffy"... Yes, that's right! "Straw hat Luffy" ...he's the one responsible for ruining my work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom!! Believe me when I say that I've spent countless, sleepless nights cultivating and nourishing the fruits of both our labor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was on the precipice... This close to finally being done... when out of the blue, that moron "Straw hat" and Trafair Law threw a monkey wrench in our carefully laid out plans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If not for their wedding and interference ...my research on "Giganticism" would have been completed long ago!!! for I am ...a genius with no equal!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With that incredibly high- tech lab built by the world government at my disposal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anything was possible... but now that it's been destroyed, my genius has been handcuffed and without compa- rable facilities, there's no way I can duplicate my previous results!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Without your financial backing and a suitable work station, even someone as prodigious as myself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cannot reproduce that perfect 'gigantifying formula' I had successfully manufactured in the recent past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that is the only thing holding you back, then you need not fret. I have already built an exact replica of your previous lab.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Heh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As luck would have it, I managed to get my hands on the blue- prints for that specific lab a while back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our "minister of candy", who also happens to be a candy craftsman", was then able to construct most of the facility by using candy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We then reinforced the entire structure with iron. So you can rest assured, there are no safety hazards or risks looming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As far as financial backing is concerned, whatever you require I shall make available to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Whaaa AAAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: When will the drug be ready?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm thinking maybe a week? No more than two at most?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Hahahaha... Mamanama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm so excited!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two weeks my ass!! You want me to come up with something...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That even the brightest minds over the past few centuries have failed to accomplish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: lickity lick j

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think of my latest creation, Caesar? Kukuki...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks just as scrumptious as the real thing, does it not?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It works in very much the same way! Luckily ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: eldest son of the Charlotte family CHARLOTTE PEROSPERO

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: (The Minister of Candy) A Candy Human Who ate the lick lick Fruit*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This thing is quite fascinating... Wouldn't you agree?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Squeeze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hngg!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oi, black leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give me back my heart before you gallavant out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh yeah... sure... enjoy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 2 weeks!! That's all the time you have.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you fail to complete your research by then, I'll turn you into a candyman and you'll be on the wrong side of my tongue, Kukukuki...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I have 2 weeks to live!!! I need to figure a way out of this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: South- Western Coast (night- time)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: gasp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: gasp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: whereze... whereze

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm starting to get really sick of repeating this process over and over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I... found them again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...wow, quite right you are.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a lot of friends you've got there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WOOF WOOF!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: MEOOO OOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Squeak Squeak!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This should be all of them... but I still don't get why they're all acting so weird!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: They're multiplying like rabbits .....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys... What the heck?! Whose idea was it to multiply?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
